found.quote: Except for breaches of confidentiality, data handling obligations, indemnification obligations, intellectual property infringement, fraud, willful misconduct, and gross negligence
Customer will defend and indemnify Vendor against third-party claims arising from Customer materials, Customer's unlawful use of the services, or use of the services contrary to this Agreement.
Vendor may process Customer Data to provide and improve the services, develop analytics, and perform other business purposes reasonably related to the service relationship.
Customer will pay fees for services performed before the effective termination date and approved reimbursable expenses incurred before that date.
Each Order Form has the initial term stated in it and will not automatically extend unless Customer signs a renewal order or gives written approval for a renewal period of one year or less.
This disclaimer applies despite any express warranty, service commitment, indemnity, confidentiality obligation, data handling obligation, or remedy stated elsewhere in this Agreement.
Vendor will provide its then-current standard security summary upon written request no more than once per year.
